name: accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month, manual report generation causes compliance issues. We automate report generation instead of manual report generation using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Timely generation of tax withholding reports for payroll compliance.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Timely generation of tax withholding reports for payroll compliance.
